title: Okavango Delta from the air.
text:
What an amazing experience to share with Alida and Lauren. I have been to the delta many times yet never seen it from above. It is the cherry on top and one well worth completing. Our pilot, Brett, was very professional and well informed of the local area. Seeing the river from above is difficult to describe. The lakes connected with hippo trails and dotted with water lilies, the plentiful red lechewe and the treat of seeing the shy and rare sitatunga was a delight for the senses. Great pods of hippo and quite a few elephant families were spotted on the verdant plains. Thanks to early rains there was no evidence of fire which create havoc and often leave the area blackened and unsightly at this time of year.
Helicopter Horizons gets my approval and is well worth the extra spend.

ownerResponse.text: Hello Kevin, thank you so much for taking the time to leave this lovely review. We are so pleased that you all enjoyed your scenic experience with us and that Brett took great care of you - we will be sure to pass this on to him. Thank you again for the review!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Not again with that office!!
text:
The pilot was nice, the Office is aweful. 
Write that we can pay in Dollar and then the ladies refused the moneybills without understandable reason. They just didn’t liked the bills. A lot of discussions - ruining the experience.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Kevin, thank you for your feedback, we appreciate every opportunity to review and improve our experience. Regarding payment, we are required by the banks of Botswana to accept only newer USD notes, which unfortunately is beyond our control, but we apologise for the inconvenience. We will have a conversation with our front-desk ladies to ensure they are clear on the reasoning going forward. We are pleased that you enjoyed your pilot, and hope that you enjoy the rest of your time in Botswana.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Very nice, but very expensive for a flight shorter than booked
text:
We booked our scenic flight throughout tour, and was surprised by the high prices; which jumped a lot from 2024 to 2025. For a 45 minutes flight we payed 285USD  per person, the equivalent of a return flight with a line company between 2 distant European capital cities. We wanted to pay with USD, cash, but they accepted only brand new banknotes. And we had the surprise that the flight actually lasted only 37 minutes, practically reducing the time over the delta by about 25%.
Otherwise great that we were able to see quite a lot of wildlife: gnus, warhogs, zebras, elephants, giraffes, and hippos.

ownerResponse.text:
Hi Adrian,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback. We truly appreciate every opportunity to review and improve the experience we offer to our guests. I have looked into your comments and would like to provide a bit of clarity:

Our rates increase year on year to accommodate fuel increases and inflation e.t.c. approximately 6% was the increase from 2024 to 2025. Unfortunately we cannot compete with commercial airline flights inter Europe as we’re an entirely different experience, offering incredible private, doors-off, narrated scenic flights, operating remotely in the Okavango Delta.

Regarding payment, we are required by the banks in Botswana to accept only newer USD notes, which is unfortunately beyond our control, but we apologise for the inconvenience.

In terms of flight duration, our records show a total start-end time of 43 minutes. Flight time is measured with onboard technology offered by our manager, from engine start to engine shutdown. During busy operational periods, air traffic control/tower, navigating all light aircraft can occasionally shorten or extend take off times, unfortunately creating slight unforeseen delays on the odd occasion. Our pilots do their very best to time their scenic perfectly, it is however not an exact science, in some instances we are also flying over the scheduled 45 min.

Again, thank you for the feedback and for the opportunity to clarify, both here and in the office. We did contact your guide directly after, offering a solution. We are delighted you enjoyed the wildlife sightings, flying over the Okavango Delta by helicopter is a must do. We hope you enjoy the rest of your time in Africa.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Worth every penny!
text: Wife and I took a one-hour "Doors Off Scenic Flight" over the Okavango Delta with our pilot Ivar.  Ivar picked us up at our lodge (Xugana Island Lodge) in his helicopter.   Seeing the delta from the air is entirely different than from the boats and game walks.  Saw an abundance of game (elephants, hippos, antelope, and best of all, a pride of lions).  As a pilot myself, Ivar was both professional and safety minded.  When we saw something of interest, he would linger and circle to insure we got a good view and pictures.  With the doors off, you can hang-outside the helicopter to get a great view.  Would love to do it again!

ownerResponse.text: Hi, thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review. We are so pleased that you enjoyed your experience with us and that Ivar took good care of you - we will be sure to pass this on to him. Thank you again for your kind words!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Amazing helicopter ride!
text: We had a fantastic experience on our helicopter tour in Botswana. Our pilot, Alec, was outstanding—his calm and professional demeanor during a particularly windy ride helped ease my husband’s anxiety. Alec provided an excellent tour of the Delta, pointing out a variety of wildlife along the way. He maintained clear and consistent communication throughout the flight, ensuring we felt informed and at ease at all times. Highly recommended!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for taking the time to leave a review - we are so happy that you enjoyed your experience with us and Alec, and will be sure to pass this on to him. Thank you for your kind words!

title: Heli + Makoro on Okavango Delta
text:
Heli + Makoro Okavango Delta tour was fantastic.  The 45 minute heli ride: pilots Zach and Ruben were fantastic and equally knowledgeable and enthusiastic.  We saw so much wildlife from the air.  Stunning.  And they were so good and finding and pointing out the wildlife. 
Makoro guide George incredibly knowledgeable.  Early start so we saw no humans until very end of 3 hours on the peaceful, beautiful waterways.  Incredible wildlife up close.  Stunning experience, not touristy. 
All highly recommended.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Paul, thank you so much for your kind words and for taking the time to leave a review! We are so pleased that you had a memorable experience, and have passed this on to those involved. Thank you again!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Tsodilo Hills 6hr experience.
text:
Tsodilo Hills experience.
Incredible. Pilot was "Billy", Tosidlo Tour guide was called "Shakes". Tour Guide & organiser was called "OK". Lots of air time. Fantastic views of the Oko. Delta. Bushman walk around the hills. View the 100,000 yr old paintings. Delicious lunch. Fab. If you can afford it, I'd recommend it. Pick your month to ensure a great experience. Watching a herd of Elephants with baby elephant in tow.... From above was brilliant. 👊

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for taking the time to review and share your experience! We are so pleased that you enjoyed it and will forward this to Billy as well.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Mom’s fav excursion
text: The helicopter picked us near our lodge and took us on a great overview of the Okavango Delta. The pilot was fun, and we all had a good time spotting animals from the air. We loved getting a bigger sense of the land. The first-time flyer was nervous about the doors being off but quickly adjusted.

ownerResponse.text: Hi, thank you so much for your positive review. We are so pleased that you enjoyed your experience with us and the unique perspective on the Okavango Delta.

title: BOOM, What A Great Time
text:
Wonderful experience and customer service.  Booking was easy and I received same day answers to multiple questions by email from Joy and others.
Our flight was cancelled due to a storm but rescheduled for the next morning without a problem.  A driver picked us up at our Maun hotel and returned us afterwards - very convenient.  Kane, our pilot, was professional and gave just the right amount of info (not too much).  We found Wildebeest, Zebra, Elephants, Hippos, Giraffes and Crocodiles.  I'm in a wheelchair and getting into the front seat was not a problem (with help).  
NOTES:  Sunscreen on your arms is a must.  I used a 200 - 600mm lens (full frame) on my DLSR and it was too long.  100 - 300mm would have been better at 500 feet up (150m).  I'm 6' 1" (185cm) and fit in the front but would not have fit in back.

ownerResponse.text: Hi, thank you so much for the 5-star review. We are so happy to hear that you had a great experience overall with the Helicopter Horizons team. It is always good to hear that your flight was filled with a variety of wildlife sightings and that Kane provided you with a truly guided scenic flight.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

original_text:
Wonderful experience and customer service.  Booking was easy and I received same day answers to multiple questions by email from Joy and others.
Our flight was cancelled due to a storm but rescheduled for the next morning without a problem.  A driver picked us up at our Maun hotel and returned us afterwards - very convenient.  Kane, our pilot, was professional and gave just the right amount of info (not too much).  We found Wildebeest, Zebra, Elephants, Hippos, Giraffes and Crocodiles.  I'm in a wheelchair and getting into the front seat was not a problem (with help).  
NOTES:  Sunscreen on your arms is a must.  I used a 200 - 600mm lens (full frame) on my DLSR and it was too long.  100 - 300mm would have been better at 500 feet up (150m).  I'm 6' 1" (185cm) and fit in the front but would not have fit in back.

title: Flying over the Delta at sunset is priceless
text: Even though we went in dry season and the Delta had little water, it was an amazing experience. The views of the landscape at sunset are spectacular. We booked the last flight that was at 17:00. We were two couples, each in a helicopter. The pilots were very nice and explained what we were seeing. The helmets have a built-in microphone so you can talk quietly. You can tell they have trained eyesight because they saw animals that we didn't even intuit. The flight leaves Maun airport, so you have to carry the passport on top (we had to go back to the accommodation to get them) and pass a security check (liquids, weapons, etc.) You can carry a backpack that is stored under the seats.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Banecas, thank you so much for the positive and informative review. We appreciate you taking the time to share your experience, and we are so pleased that you enjoyed your scenic with us.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Flight over Okavango Delta
text: So expensive but so worth it. It was terrifying but exhilarating with no doors on the helicopter! Saw heaps of animals & amazing seeing it from above after two nights camping there. Our NZ pilot was so friendly and chatty. Highly recommend!

ownerResponse.text: Hi MummaandCo, we are so pleased that you enjoyed your experience with your pilot and Helicopter Horizons. Thank you so much for taking the time to review and we hope to see you in the future again!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Must-do experience!
text: Incredible experience with fantastic pilot. We flew over the Desert and Delta Xunaga Island Lodge surrounds. I was in a wedding dress and my husband in his wedding suit as we were on our elopement with our photographer. We had a champagne stop in the midst of all the wildlife and the beautiful Delta. The pilot, Matt Doogan was very professional and skilled. Made us feel totally at ease and pointed out all the wildlife. He went back past some areas at our request so we could get better photos and chose an awesome spot to land for the stop. Forever grateful for his kindness and expertise and for his help in making our elopement so special. We will certainly be using helicopter horizons again! Thank you!

ownerResponse.text: Hi, thank you so much for taking the time to review and congratulations on your elopement! We are very pleased that you enjoyed your experience with us and will pass this onto Matt. Thank you again.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Amazing service from Horizon Helicopters raised the bar, and delivered memories to last a lifetime.
text:
Helicopter Horizons is the first helicopter tour my wife and son had been on, and from start to finish, this company exceeded our expectations and raised the bar (see note below on why they raised the bar!).

We initially booked a 45-minute flight from Maun airport at 3 pm, but then discovered from our safari director that it would not be possible because we were due to go to Moremi that day and the gates closed at 6:30 pm. Horizon was very quick to respond to my query about changing the flight, and we switched our flight to Khwai Airstrip and opted for 30 minutes.

On the day, the helicopter flew into Khwai on the dot, and a very helpful pilot (sorry, I can’t remember his name :-( ) provided an excellent experience. The Okavango Delta is a pretty magical place, but Horizon literally provided an otherworldly perspective—something we will never forget for the rest of our lives.

So, why did Horizon raise the bar? As part of our visit to Southern Africa, we also booked a helicopter flight in Zimbabwe to see Victoria Falls. That company’s flight on the day was shorter than advertised, and we just kept comparing it to the amazing service from Horizon! Horizon’s helicopter duration was exactly as advertised and a bit more. Now that’s exceeding your customer’s expectations! Horizon raised the bar—well done and thank you!

Thank you very much to Joy, Bonolo, and Ludo. And last but not least, thank you to the helicopter pilot for a truly unforgettable experience (sorry I forgot his name). So, if you are in beautiful Botswana and the Okavango Delta, definitely book a flight with Horizon.

ownerResponse.text: Hi Chevaan, thank you so much for taking the time to review and for your positive feedback. We are so glad that you and your family enjoyed your experience with us and we hope to see you in the future again. We have shared your kind words with your pilot, Zac, and those mentioned above. Thank you again.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

It was like being in a nature documentary. 

Everything well organised, very professional.

title: Such an amazing experience!
text: This helicopter ride was absolutely one of the highlights of our safari trip! We flew from Xugana to Tsodilo Hills and then to Camp Moremi. The sights were incredible, we got some amazing photos and videos and thoroughly enjoyed every minute. Pilot Fondy & Pilot Torfi were such a great guides for us. We felt very safe and would 100% recommend and book again. Thank you!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Emma, we are so happy that you had a wonderful experience flying with us and that our pilots were able to further enhance your Botswana safari adventure. Thank you so much for the lovely review, we hope to see you all in the future.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: A dream come true
text: Helicopter Horizons made my dream of flying over the Okavango Delta true and I will always be grateful for this very special experience! Thank you so much pilot Frondy & team for accommodating our very last-minute request! We loved every minute of our flight. The views of the landscape and the wildlife were absolutely amazing and it was overwhelming to see the vast expanses of the delta. Thank you so much for making my dream come true!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Petra, we are thrilled that you had a fantastic flight and experience. It truly is amazing to see the vastness of the Delta and all the wildlife below from the air. Thank you so much for the review, and again, we are so happy we could fulfil a bucket list item for you!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Eyeful
text:
We didn't remember anything in advance.
A plane ride? Complete. And we see better in a helicopter.
Chance led us there, from the square for 10 a.m. the next day, a 3/4 hour tour.
A marvel, small two-blade helicopter, 2 pilots and 2 seats behind, no door: ideal.
The piggy bank: €250 per person, it’s worth it.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Bucket list trip par excellence!
text:
We’ve been travelling around Botswana for the last 10 days and as a final expedition, we took a flight over the Delta with Fondi at the controls. To say the flight exceeded our expectations doesn’t even start to describe the experience!  It was a safari tour on speed without the lumps and bumps of the 4WD jeep used for the rest of our journey. Fondi was an excellent guide to the wildlife and the R44 a perfect platform for the journey. It’s not inexpensive but worth every penny.
 5 stars!

ownerResponse.text: Hi Cliona, thank you for the amazing review! We will let Fondy know that you thoroughly enjoyed your flight and experience with him. A helicopter flight truly is a must-do for the bucket list.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Great scenic heli flight of Kalahari salt pans
text: My daughter and I had a great 30 minute flight with Matt Doogan over the salt pans near Jack's Camp.  The views were amazing and we really enjoyed the experience, as well as the wildlife: lions, elephant and ostrich to name but a few.  Matt was super helpful too!

ownerResponse.text: Hello Jonathan, we are so glad to hear that you and your daughter had a great flight and enjoyed your overall experience. Thank you for your review and we will let Matt know that you were super happy with your flight too!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Don't forget the selfie. Spectacular views!
text: Charming young man from Vancouver, BC was our pilot.  Knowledgeable, courteous.  Brendon, our pilot, pointed out everything he saw before we knew it was even there.  Spectacular views of the Okavango Delta.  Thrilling flight.  No doors on the helicopter made for obstacle free views.  Don't forget to take a selfie in the helicopter.  In the excitement of it all, we forgot. Once in a lifetime excursion for us.

ownerResponse.text: We are so happy to hear that you had a thrilling flight over the Delta! Hopefully, you'll be back in Botswana again and will have another opportunity to take that selfie in the helicopter : ). Thank you so much for the great review and charming words for Brendon. We will definitely let him know!

placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

title: Best way to see the Okovango Delta
text: Wat een fantastische manier om de Okovango Delta te zien, een scenic tour met Helicopter Horizons. We dachten eerst aan een scenic flight in een vliegtuigje, maar zijn heel blij dat we toch de helicopter hebben gekozen. Onze familie van 4 personen was verdeeld over 2 helicopters, beide met open deuren waardoor iedereen de beste plek heeft en je onbelemmerd uitzicht hebt. Met uitgebreide uitleg van piloten Fondy, Ruben, Scott en hun Canadese collega. Echt een aanrader!!

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

original_title: Best way to see the Okovango Delta
original_text: Wat een fantastische manier om de Okovango Delta te zien, een scenic tour met Helicopter Horizons. We dachten eerst aan een scenic flight in een vliegtuigje, maar zijn heel blij dat we toch de helicopter hebben gekozen. Onze familie van 4 personen was verdeeld over 2 helicopters, beide met open deuren waardoor iedereen de beste plek heeft en je onbelemmerd uitzicht hebt. Met uitgebreide uitleg van piloten Fondy, Ruben, Scott en hun Canadese collega. Echt een aanrader!!
translated_title: Best way to see the Okovango Delta
translated_text: What a fantastic way to see the Okovango Delta: a scenic tour with Helicopter Horizons. We initially considered a scenic flight in a small plane, but are very glad we chose the helicopter instead. Our family of four was split between two helicopters, both with open doors, ensuring everyone had the best spot and an unobstructed view. This included detailed explanations from pilots Fondy, Ruben, Scott, and their Canadian colleague. Highly recommended!

title: A great way to start a safari trip
text: It was the first thing i did when arraiving in Maun and it was a great kickstart to the mobile safati with Unlimited that i went on. You got to see the delta from the above and the pilot pointed out the animals that you woldnt had noticed. It was a great flight and a wonderful time!

ownerResponse.text: Thank you so much for the review. We are so happy you had a fantastic helicopter flight to start your safari with! It truly is a unique experience to see all animals and landscapes from a bird-eye view like that.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons
placeInfo.address: Mathiba I Street, Maun, Ngamiland East Botswana

You got to see the delta from the above and the pilot pointed out the animals that you woldnt had noticed. It was a great flight and a wonderful time!

title: Awesome View of the Okavango Delta
text: After 7 days of getting an "African Massage" and thoroughly enjoying all the wildlife, my wife and I looked forward to the helicopter flight included in our travel arrangements and a different perspective of the Okavango Delta.  We were not disappointed!  Hippos, elephants, crocodiles were everywhere along the winding Khwai River and its endless marshes.  From above, it seems the Delta goes on forever, Great views! What an awesome experience our Pilot Brendon provided for us.  Professional and super courteous he narrated so nicely what was going on below.  Make sure the doors are off!  Thank you Brendon and Helicopter Horizons for a most memorable experience.

ownerResponse.text: Hello Mark, we are so happy to hear you had a wonderful experience flying with us and the pleasant words for Brendon. It all sounds magical, it truly is a unique way to view the Delta. We hope to have you back flying with us in the future and create even more memories.

title: Magnificent.
text:
Life has gotten in the way of me writing this review as our flight was in June 2022 but better late than never.............. 
Our trip was originally booked for 2020 but as for many others C19 had other plans for us. HH rescheduled without any issues and for that we were grateful. At all times correspondence was swift. 

To the flight itself......Unforgetable, one of those experiences which will last us a lifetime.  Our pilot was a lovely young man called Dylan, professional and friendly. We had the sunset trip with a sundowner stop. We had Okavango "The Sentinal" Gin rather than Champagne, we much prefer gin and the locally made gin is delicious.  

We had doors off the helicopter so that we were able to take photos. The scenery, the sunset brought me to tears. Stunning, simply stunning.  It might be a wee bit costly but as we get to our twilight years and realise that you have to live for today as tomorrow is never certain, I say do it now. You won't regret it.

title: Amazing experience with Helicopter Horizons!
text: I had the pleasure of doing a helicopter safari with Helicopter Horizons on my most recent trip to Botswana, and it was absolutely the highlight of the trip! 10/10. I would highly recommend for anyone looking for an incredible experience!

title: An Incredible Experience
text: We had a last-minute opportunity to take a scenic flight, and it was one of the best experiences we've ever had. Fondy was our pilot- he was fantastic: professional, knowledgeable, happy to accommodate requests, and full of interesting information as we flew over the delta. There is nothing like seeing Africa from a heli, we will absolutely book with HH on our next trip.

placeInfo.name: Helicopter Horizons

title: Best experience of our lives!
text:
Our helicopter ride with helicopter horizons was incredible. We saw so much wildlife and just seeing everything from above was just amazing. The scenery and views were just breathtaking. Fondy our pilot was amazing, he was so kind and ensured we were comfortable and answered all our questions. He was so knowledgeable about all the animals that we saw. He also helped me propose to my girlfriend and for that I can’t thank him enough. He was able to get plenty of pictures and recorded the entire proposal. If you travel to Botswana Helicopter Horizons is essential to get the entire Botswana experience.

Matt

title: Incredible/highlight
text:
An absolutely amazing flight. We had returned from doing a 2 night, 3 day tented trip in the Okavango. To see it from the air was incredible and gave you a different perspective to what is experienced on the ground. Our pilot Alex was wonderful, spotted so many animals, made sure we got to see it all and made for great photos. A definite highlight of our 4 week trip. Highly recommend doing this trip and having no doors made it an extra special trip.

Thank you Alex and helicopter Horizons.

title: Stunning & Scenic Tour
text: Wow, what an experience! This was my first time taking a helicopter ride, and it was incredible. Helicopter Horizons is a unique and fun way to see the Delta. The pilots were very friendly and knowledgable. If you want to do something interesting or go to a place very few people have traveled, then book with them. It's a must do, and I'd highly recommend.
